tools.name: create_customer_support_ticket
tools.description: Create a customer support ticket in the enterprise support platform.

customer_id.description: The customer identifier used by the support and billing systems.

priority.description: Priority for downstream routing and SLA decisions.

summary.description: One sentence summary for the support ticket, written clearly enough that multiple downstream teams can infer what happened, what broke, and…

product_area.description: Product area relevant to the ticket for triage, reporting, quality review, postmortem tagging, and historical analysis.

user_visible_impact.description: Describe the impact in practical user-facing terms.

step.description: Step instruction for reproducing the problem in a deterministic way.

expected.description: Expected result if the system had behaved normally.

actual.description: Actual result observed by the user or operator.

tools.name: lookup_internal_order
tools.description: Look up an order record in the internal commerce system.

order_id.description: Canonical order identifier from the backend order service.

include_history.description: Whether to include full status history in the response.

response_mode.description: How much data should be returned.
